sections.heading: Flexbox Deep Dive
sections.body: Flexbox controls layout in one direction:

code.explanation: justify-content = horizontal. align-items = vertical. flex: 1 means 'take all available space'.
repeat(3, 1fr) creates 3 equal columns. auto-fit + minmax creates responsive grids automatically.
Define variables in :root. Reference with var(--name). Change themes by overriding variables.

summary: Flexbox for 1D layouts, Grid for 2D layouts. CSS variables for reusable values and theming. auto-fit + minmax creates responsive grids without media queries.
